summary: SEO Phase 2 Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (100%). All Phase 2 features working: slug generation for users (66 users have seo_slugs), user-by-slug lookup, store directory with team listings and ratings, UTM link builder, visit tracking with analytics, updated sitemap with salesperson/store URLs (193 total), updated robots.txt with /salesperson/ and /store/ Allow directives. Frontend: Store directory page renders correctly with store info, team cards, and navigation to card pages. Salesperson slug redirect works (/salesperson/forest-ward-denver-co → /card/{id}). UTM tracking fires silently on page load.

issues: Some test users shown without photos (initials placeholder instead) - this is expected behavior for users without photos

critical_code_review_comments: seo.py _user_slug() properly concatenates name + city + state for SEO-friendly slugs
generate-slugs endpoint handles uniqueness collisions by appending -1, -2, etc.
store-directory returns full team with review_count and avg_rating per member
UTM link builder uses /salesperson/{slug} when user has seo_slug, falls back to /card/{id}
track-visit stores individual visits AND updates aggregate stats in seo_stats collection
analytics endpoint returns visits, last_visit, recent_sources (last 50), and short URL clicks
Frontend [slug].tsx pages correctly use expo-router useLocalSearchParams and router.replace for redirects
SEOHead component tracks UTM visits silently via api.post on web platform
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (66 users already have seo_slugs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Phase 2 is complete and all features working. Sitemap has 193 URLs including 66 /salesperson/{slug} and 30 /store/{slug} URLs. UTM tracking is recording visits - the analytics endpoint shows recent_sources with source/medium/timestamp. Store directory at /store/imos-demo shows 5 team members. The salesperson redirect flow works: /salesperson/forest-ward-denver-co → /card/69a5386a690af652a8538fe9. Phase 1 features (robots.txt, sitemap, meta endpoints) continue to work correctly.

backend.POST /api/seo/generate-slugs: PASS - Returns {updated: N} count of users updated
backend.GET /api/seo/store-directory/imos-demo: PASS - Returns store info, team (5 members), team_count, Schema.org JSON-LD
backend.POST /api/seo/utm-link (card): PASS - Returns URL with /salesperson/{slug} when user has slug
backend.POST /api/seo/track-visit: PASS - Returns {tracked: true} and stores visit data
backend.GET /api/seo/analytics/{user_id}: PASS - Returns card_visits, last_visit, recent_sources, total_link_clicks

frontend./store/imos-demo: PASS - Renders store header (logo, name, location, Call/Website buttons), team section (5 members with initials/photos), footer
frontend./store/imos-demo team click: PASS - Clicking team member navigates to /card/{id}
frontend./salesperson/forest-ward-denver-co: PASS - Resolves slug and redirects to /card/69a5386a690af652a8538fe9
frontend.UTM tracking on card page: PASS - Visit tracked with source/medium/campaign in seo_stats
